// Who We Are

BUILT FOR
CHAMPIONS

DC Ultimate Frisbee Academy was founded with a singular purpose: to grow Ultimate Frisbee in Malaysia by giving the next generation of players a structured, high-level environment to develop and compete.

We specialise in training high school students — bridging the gap between casual play and competitive excellence. Our coaching team brings deep knowledge of the game and a passion for developing not just athletes, but leaders who embody the Spirit of the Game.

Our academy is a recognised pipeline into the Malaysian U20 National Team, providing the training environment, tactical depth, and competitive exposure needed to represent the nation.

Our Mission
To develop the next generation of Malaysian Ultimate players through elite coaching, school partnerships, and a culture built on Spirit of the Game.
DC Ultimate Academy · Shark Alarm Open 2025
Shark Alarm Open 2025 · In Action
DC Ultimate Academy · Team

// What We Offer

OUR
PROGRAMS

01
School
Partnerships

We partner long-term with high schools across Malaysia to integrate Ultimate Frisbee into their sports programmes — handling coaching, curriculum, and competitive development from the ground up.

Ongoing · Long-Term Partnership
02
Personal &
Small Group

For players who want accelerated growth, our personal and small-group sessions deliver targeted skill-building — from throws and footwork to disc strategy and the mental side of the game.

Flexible Scheduling
03
On-Campus
Coaching

We bring certified coaches directly to your school to deliver structured, progressive training for student athletes — covering fundamentals all the way to competitive team tactics.

On-Campus · Custom Programme
🏅
Community Contribution
Malaysia U20 National Team Training
DC Ultimate proudly runs the Malaysian U20 National Team training as part of our commitment to growing the sport and giving youth players a pathway to represent the nation.

// Schools & Institutions

PARTNER
WITH US

01
Expert Coaching On Campus

We bring experienced coaches directly to your school to run structured training for your students.

02
Curriculum & Development

A progressive framework from beginner fundamentals to competitive team tactics, tailored to your school's needs.

03
National Team Pathway

Top-performing students gain exposure to national-level training — a clear path toward representing Malaysia.

04
Competitions & Exposure

We connect schools to local and national tournaments, giving students the competitive experience that drives growth.

School Partnership Programme
🏫
Building the future of Malaysian Ultimate, one school at a time.

We're actively seeking forward-thinking schools who want to give their students access to one of the world's fastest-growing sports — with a clear pathway to national competition.
